scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build/pdf.worker.min.mjs dist/omni-pdfjs.worker.js && esbuild src/omni-pdfjs.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/omni-pdfjs.js --loader:.css=text --loader:.ttf=file --loader:.woff=file --loader:.woff2=file --define:process=globalThis.__omni_process_polyfill --banner:js="globalThis.__omni_process_polyfill ??= { env: {}, getBuiltinModule: () => undefined };"
scripts.watch: mkdir -p dist && cp node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build/pdf.worker.min.mjs dist/omni-pdfjs.worker.js && esbuild src/omni-pdfjs.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/omni-pdfjs.js --loader:.css=text --loader:.ttf=file --loader:.woff=file --loader:.woff2=file --define:process=globalThis.__omni_process_polyfill --banner:js="globalThis.__omni_process_polyfill ??= { env: {}, getBuiltinModule: () => undefined };" --watch
